questions.question: What type of learning method is clustering?
In agglomerative hierarchical clustering, how does the algorithm start?
options: With all points in one cluster
With each pattern in its own cluster
questions.answer: With each pattern in its own cluster

questions.question: Single-linkage clustering defines distance between two clusters as:
options: Minimum distance between any pair of points
questions.answer: Minimum distance between any pair of points

questions.question: Which linkage method is most likely to produce “chained” clusters?
Complete-linkage clustering measures cluster distance using:
Which clustering method is non-hierarchical?
In K-means clustering, each cluster is represented by:
What is the first step in the K-means algorithm?
options: Choose the number of clusters k
questions.answer: Choose the number of clusters k

A logistic regression model is given by: p(y = 1 | x) = 1 / (1 + exp(−(β₀ + β₁x₁ + β₂x₂))). Given: β₀ = −2, β₁ = 0.8, β₂ = 0.6. For the data point: x = (x₁, x₂) = (3, 1). Using a classification threshold of 0.5, the predicted class is:
In the linear regression equation Y=β0+β1X+ε, β1 represents:
Residuals in linear regression are:
options: Differences between actual and predicted values
questions.answer: Differences between actual and predicted values

questions.question: Given the following values from a regression model: SStot = 160, SSres = 40. The coefficient of determination R² is:
An R² value of 0.82 means:
options: 82% of variance in Y is explained
questions.answer: 82% of variance in Y is explained

questions.question: Linear regression is unsuitable for classification because:
options: Predictions can fall outside valid probability range
questions.answer: Predictions can fall outside valid probability range
